data.title: IREIT Global Extends and Increases Loan Facility
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from IREIT Global ( (SG:UD1U) ).

IREIT Global has announced an amendment to its existing facility agreement with UniCredit Bank GmbH and Landesbank Hessen-Thüringen Girozentrale, increasing the loan facility to €220,760,000 and extending the maturity date to July 31, 2029. This move is significant for IREIT’s financial strategy, as it provides additional capital and extends the timeline for repayment, potentially enhancing the company’s operational flexibility and market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:UD1U) stock is a Hold with a S$0.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IREIT Global stock, see the SG:UD1U Stock Forecast page.

More about IREIT Global

IREIT Global is a real estate investment trust based in Singapore, managed by IREIT Global Group Pte. Ltd. The company focuses on property investments and management, with a market focus on real estate assets.

Average Trading Volume: 686,684

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$390M

data.title: Proximar Seafood Completes Rights Issue, Boosts Share Capital
data.description:
Proximar Seafood AS ( (DE:84Q) ) has shared an update.

Proximar Seafood has successfully completed a rights issue, resulting in the subscription and allocation of 150 million shares and the issuance of an additional 13.5 million shares to underwriters. This move increases the company’s registered share capital to NOK 31,989,006, potentially strengthening its financial position and market presence.

More about Proximar Seafood AS

Proximar Seafood is a Norwegian company specializing in land-based salmon farming. It operates a production facility near Mount Fuji in Japan, utilizing high-quality groundwater to produce fresh Atlantic Salmon. The company’s strategic location near a major fish market offers cost and environmental benefits.

Average Trading Volume: 365,320

Current Market Cap: NOK316.7M

data.title: Rockwood Strategic Chairman Increases Shareholding
data.description:
Rockwood Realisation Plc ( (GB:RKW) ) has provided an update.

Rockwood Strategic Plc announced that its Chairman, Noel Lamb, purchased 3,200 ordinary shares of the company at a price of 279.89 pence per share. This transaction increases Mr. Lamb’s total shareholding to 37,700 shares, representing 0.07% of the company’s issued share capital, indicating a vote of confidence in the company’s prospects.

data.title: Yibin City Commercial Bank Announces 2025 Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description:
An announcement from Yibin City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2596) ) is now available.

Yibin City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd has announced its 2025 third extraordinary general meeting to be held on October 27, 2025. The meeting will address several key resolutions, including the abolition of the board of supervisors and amendments to the Articles of Association and procedural rules. These changes could significantly impact the governance structure and operational procedures of the bank, potentially affecting its strategic direction and stakeholder engagement.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2596) stock is a Buy with a HK$3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Yibin City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:2596 Stock Forecast page.

More about Yibin City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd. Class H

Yibin City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating within the financial services industry. It is not an authorized institution under Hong Kong’s Banking Ordinance and is not subject to the supervision of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, nor is it authorized to conduct banking or deposit-taking business in Hong Kong.

data.title: Enertopia Highlights Oxyhydrogen Safety and Environmental Benefits
data.description:
Enertopia ( (ENRT) ) has issued an update.

On October 10, 2025, Enertopia Corp. released a video demonstrating the safety and environmental advantages of oxyhydrogen gas compared to natural gas and propane. The video highlights that oxyhydrogen, a renewable energy source, produces water vapor instead of hazardous byproducts and poses less explosion risk in case of leaks, positioning it as a safer alternative for various applications.

More about Enertopia

Enertopia Corp. is an Energy Solutions Company focused on modern technology through its intellectual property patents in green technologies, aiming to build shareholder value.

data.title: Hilton Food CFO Exercises Share Options, Retains Shares
data.description:
Hilton Food ( (GB:HFG) ) has shared an announcement.

Hilton Food Group PLC announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Matt Osborne, has exercised share options under the company’s Long Term Incentive Plan, acquiring 2,304 ordinary shares at no cost. Osborne has opted to personally cover the tax liabilities associated with this transaction and has retained all the shares. This move reflects confidence in the company’s future prospects and may positively influence stakeholder perception.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HFG) stock is a Buy with a £10.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hilton Food stock, see the GB:HFG Stock Forecast page.
